title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · Agent Control Room
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a tested tool-loop state machine while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
